name: The Great Pumpkin Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, oatmeal, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Set aside.
2. In another large bowl, cream together the oil, brown sugar, white sugar, egg, and vanilla using a mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Add 1/4 cup of the canned pumpkin to the mixture and continue mixing for an additional minute.
4. Alternately add the flour mixture and the remaining canned pumpkin, stirring after each addition.
5. Fold in the nuts and raisins.
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15-20 minutes or until firm and lightly browned. This yields about 5-6 dozen cookies.
8. Unbaked dough may be frozen in an airtight container. Thaw in the refrigerator; bake as directed.
Note: Per cookie: 116 Kcal, 6g fat (0.7g sat fat), 45% CFF, 99mg Na, 5.9g PRO, 14.8g CHO.
